title: Codebase Assessment
description: Artifact generated during REVERSE_ENGINEERING_PENDING that documents an existing, unfinished, or legacy codebase before drafting a product vision.

detected_tech_stack.description: Languages, frameworks, and libraries found in the source code.

current_architecture.description: A high-level summary of how the existing code is structured (e.g., MVC, monolithic, microservices).

broken_or_incomplete_areas.description: Known bugs, missing features, or failing tests discovered during the scan.

risk_hotspots.description: Areas of high technical debt, security vulnerabilities, or tight coupling.
